properties.name: Hotel Casa del Mar
properties.description: 1920s oceanfront hotel with serene rooms & suites, plus a lounge, 2 eateries & a wellness spa.

properties.name: Shutters on the Beach
properties.description: Polished beachfront hotel offering elegant dining & a casual cafe/bar, plus an outdoor pool & a spa.

properties.name: Huntley Hotel Santa Monica Beach
properties.description: Sophisticated rooms, some with ocean views, in an upscale hotel with a penthouse restaurant/bar.

properties.name: Oceana Santa Monica, LXR Hotels & Resorts
properties.description: Eclectic rooms & suites, some with ocean views, in an airy hotel with a restaurant & outdoor pool.

properties.name: Santa Monica Proper Hotel
properties.description: Upmarket hotel featuring modern rooms & suites, plus a rooftop pool, dining & a bar.

properties.name: Marina Del Rey Hotel
properties.description: Contemporary rooms & suites with free Wi-Fi, plus a pool & a restaurant with a terrace.

properties.name: Hotel Erwin
properties.description: Vibrant, modern hotel offering free Wi-Fi, dining & a lively rooftop bar with ocean/city views.

properties.name: Fairmont Miramar Hotel & Bungalows
properties.description: Posh quarters in a 1921 venue with a spa, an outdoor pool & a chic restaurant with a communal table.

properties.name: Sandbourne Santa Monica, Autograph Collection
properties.description: Upscale hotel near the beach with a restaurant, an outdoor pool & a fitness center.

properties.name: Viceroy Santa Monica
properties.description: Posh quarters in an upmarket hideaway offering 2 pools, refined dining, a fitness center & a bar.

properties.name: Maison Twenty Seven
properties.description: Mediterranean Revival-style hotel from 1927 offering upscale, quirky quarters & a lobby cafe.

properties.name: Hilton Santa Monica Hotel & Suites
properties.description: Understated rooms, some with partial ocean views, in a refined hotel offering a restaurant & a pool.

properties.name: Hyatt Centric Delfina Santa Monica
properties.description: Modern lodging offering airy rooms, an outdoor pool & a laid-back restaurant with a terrace.

properties.name: Hotel MdR Marina del Rey - a DoubleTree by Hilton
properties.description: Upscale west LA hotel with a locavore restaurant, outdoor pool & sundeck, plus free WiFi.
